specific_mechanism: LayerSVGD: treat per-layer hidden states {h_l : l∈1..L} as SVGD particles. For each batch, compute layer-wise Stein update φ*_l(h_l) = (1/L) Σ_{l'} [k(h_{l'}, h_l) s(h_{l'}) + ∇_{h_{l'}} k(h_{l'}, h_l)] with RBF kernel and learned score s(h) = ∇ log p_target. Add λ_S φ*_l as an auxiliary residual contribution at each layer.
llm_application: LayerSVGD residual: at each transformer layer l, in addition to standard residual update h_{l+1} = h_l + Attention(h_l) + FFN(h_l), add an SVGD-style update Δh_l = λ_S φ*_l(h_l) where φ*_l = (1/L) Σ_{l'} [k(h_{l'}, h_l) s_θ(h_{l'}) + ∇k(h_{l'}, h_l)]. Learned score network s_θ produces gradients of log-target prior. The intent: enforce cross-layer diversity (via repulsion term) and alignment to a learned prior (via attraction term).
novelty_claim: SVGD foundation (Liu-Wang 2016 arXiv 1608.04471) exists; SVGD with transformer (Springer 2025) uses SVGD as final output layer not as cross-layer residual. LayerSVGD as per-layer Stein-particle update is more specific.
motivation_justification: SVGD update is a closed-form algorithm with Stein-kernel construction. The candidate transfers the per-particle Stein update to per-layer hidden state.
sub_mechanisms: M_1: Per-layer hidden state as SVGD particle
M_2: RBF kernel pairwise update between layers
M_4: Auxiliary residual contribution λ_S φ*
content_words: stein variational gradient descent svgd kernel
